# SoccerStars

A soccer game made in Java.

## How to play

- Download the.jar file
- Run it
- Play

## How to compile

- Download the.zip file
- Unzip it
- Open the folder
- Open the folder "src"
- Open the file "Main.java"
- Run it

## How to compile and run

- Download the.zip file
- Unzip it
- Open the folder
- Open the folder "src"
- Open the file "Main.java"
- Compile it
- Run it

## How to compile and run with the.jar file

- Download the.zip file
- Unzip it
- Open the folder
- Open the file "SoccerStars.jar"
- Run it

## How to compile and run with the.jar file on Linux

- Download the.zip file
